title: Elevated Morning Blood Pressure 148/92 mmHg (Rising Trend)
description: Morning BP 148/92 mmHg exceeds target of <130/80 for patient with HTN + diabetes. Rising from 134/82 previously.
clinical_context: Patient has Stage 2 Essential Hypertension, currently on Amlodipine 10mg + Losartan 100mg daily. Target BP for diabetic patient is <130/80 mmHg per guidelines.
